upper.title: Reflexive and reciprocal pronouns
upper.content:
📌 Reflexive Pronouns (Đại từ phản thân)
Dùng khi chủ ngữ và tân ngữ là cùng một người/vật.

• myself – tự tôi
• yourself – tự bạn (số ít)
• himself – tự anh ấy
• herself – tự cô ấy
• itself – tự nó
• ourselves – tự chúng tôi
• yourselves – tự các bạn
• themselves – tự họ

She taught herself to play the piano.
He cut himself while shaving.
The door closed by itself.
📌 Công dụng của Reflexive Pronouns
1. Làm tân ngữ trực tiếp/gián tiếp:
I hurt myself playing football.
She bought herself a new dress.

2. Nhấn mạnh chủ ngữ/tân ngữ (emphatic):
The CEO himself approved the project.
I will do it myself.

3. Sau giới từ chỉ địa điểm:
She looked at herself in the mirror.
He lives by himself. (một mình)

4. Thành ngữ với reflexive pronouns:
• by myself/yourself – một mình
• enjoy yourself – vui vẻ nhé
• help yourself – tự nhiên dùng
• behave yourself – cư xử đúng mực
• find yourself – thấy mình ở trong tình huống
📌 Reciprocal Pronouns (Đại từ tương hỗ)
Dùng để diễn tả hành động qua lại giữa hai hay nhiều người.

• each other – lẫn nhau (thường dùng cho 2 người)
• one another – lẫn nhau (thường dùng cho >2 người)

They love each other deeply.
The students helped one another with the project.
We have known each other for years.

📝 Có thể dùng sở hữu: They held each other's hands.
📌 Phân biệt Reflexive và Reciprocal
• Reflexive: Hành động tự tác động lên chính mình
They blamed themselves for the mistake. (tự đổ lỗi cho bản thân)

• Reciprocal: Hành động qua lại giữa các chủ thể
They blamed each other for the mistake. (đổ lỗi cho nhau)
⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng
• Sau giới từ chỉ nơi chốn (behind, in front of, etc.) → dùng reflexive nếu chủ ngữ = tân ngữ
She closed the door behind her. (không dùng herself vì behind là giới từ chỉ nơi chốn)

• Một số động từ KHÔNG dùng với reflexive pronouns trong tiếng Anh:
❌ I washed myself. → ✅ I washed. / ✅ I had a wash.
get up, sit down, stand up, wake up, dress, shave, relax
The children enjoyed themselves at the amusement park.Reflexive: enjoy oneself = vui vẻ
They looked at one another in disbelief.Reciprocal: nhìn nhau

exercises.q: She taught ___ to play the guitar when she was twelve.
exercises.exp: Reflexive pronoun: tự học

exercises.q: They looked at ___ and smiled warmly.
exercises.exp: Reciprocal: nhìn nhau, qua lại giữa 2+ người

exercises.q: The president ___ attended the ceremony despite his busy schedule.
exercises.exp: Emphatic reflexive: nhấn mạnh chủ ngữ

exercises.q: Be careful with that knife or you might cut ___.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự cắt vào mình

exercises.q: The students helped ___ to prepare for the final exam.
exercises.exp: Reciprocal: giúp đỡ lẫn nhau (nhiều người)

exercises.q: I couldn't believe that the door opened by ___.
exercises.exp: By itself: tự động, không ai tác động

exercises.q: We really enjoyed ___ at the party last Saturday night.
exercises.exp: Enjoy oneself: thành ngữ với reflexive

exercises.q: My grandmother lives by ___ in a small cottage by the sea.
exercises.exp: By herself: một mình

exercises.q: The two brothers haven't spoken to ___ for over ten years.
exercises.exp: Each other: qua lại giữa 2 người

exercises.q: Please help ___ to some more cake and coffee.
exercises.exp: Help yourself: thành ngữ tự nhiên dùng

exercises.q: The cat cleaned ___ thoroughly after eating its dinner.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự liếm sạch lông

exercises.q: They blamed ___ for the accident even though it wasn't their fault.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự đổ lỗi cho bản thân

exercises.q: You need to believe in ___ if you want to succeed in life.
exercises.exp: Reflexive sau giới từ 'in'

exercises.q: The members of the team encouraged ___ throughout the competition.
exercises.exp: One another: qua lại giữa nhiều người

exercises.q: She found ___ in a difficult situation after losing her job.
exercises.exp: Find oneself: thấy mình trong tình huống

exercises.q: The children behaved ___ very well during the school trip.
exercises.exp: Behave oneself: cư xử đúng mực

exercises.q: They gave ___ plenty of time to finish the project.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự cho mình thời gian

exercises.q: The CEO ___ interviewed all the candidates personally.
exercises.exp: Emphatic: chính CEO tự phỏng vấn

exercises.q: We should introduce ___ properly before the meeting starts.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự giới thiệu bản thân

exercises.q: The neighbours helped ___ when the storm damaged their houses.
exercises.exp: Each other: giúp đỡ lẫn nhau

exercises.q: I had to remind ___ to stay calm during the presentation.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự nhắc nhở bản thân

exercises.q: The new parents barely had any time for ___ after the baby arrived.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: thời gian cho bản thân

exercises.q: She taught ___ (reflexive) to speak French using online resources.
exercises.exp: Taught herself: tự học

exercises.q: The two colleagues always support ___ (reciprocal) during difficult times.
exercises.exp: Each other: hỗ trợ lẫn nhau (2 người)

exercises.q: The director ___ (emphatic) approved the final version of the film.
exercises.exp: Emphatic reflexive: nhấn mạnh chủ ngữ

exercises.q: Please behave ___ (reflexive) during the ceremony.
exercises.exp: Behave yourself: cư xử đúng mực

exercises.q: After the argument, they refused to look at ___ (reciprocal).
exercises.exp: Reciprocal: không nhìn nhau

exercises.q: I've locked ___ (reflexive) out of the house again!
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự nhốt mình ra ngoài

exercises.q: They enjoyed ___ (reflexive) so much at the concert that they bought tickets for the next show.
exercises.exp: Enjoyed themselves: vui vẻ

exercises.q: The puppy hurt ___ (reflexive) when it jumped off the sofa.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự làm đau

exercises.q: We all introduced ___ (reflexive) at the beginning of the workshop.
exercises.exp: Introduced ourselves: tự giới thiệu

exercises.q: The team members motivated ___ (reciprocal) throughout the marathon.
exercises.exp: One another: động viên nhau (nhiều người)

exercises.q: She found ___ (reflexive) standing in front of the wrong classroom.
exercises.exp: Found herself: thấy mình đang ở

exercises.q: The children dried ___ (reflexive) with the towels after swimming.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: tự lau khô người

exercises.q: They've known ___ (reciprocal) since they were in primary school.
exercises.exp: Each other: quen biết nhau

exercises.q: The door closed by ___ (reflexive) because of the strong wind.
exercises.exp: By itself: tự động

exercises.q: I had to force ___ (reflexive) to get out of bed this morning.
exercises.exp: Reflexive: ép bản thân

exercises.q: You should be proud of ___ (reflexive) for completing such a difficult task.
exercises.exp: Proud of yourself: tự hào về bản thân

exercises.q: The twins look so similar that even they sometimes confuse ___ (reflexive) with ___ (reciprocal).
exercises.exp: Themselves: tự nhầm bản thân; each other: nhầm lẫn nhau

exercises.q: She prides ___ (reflexive) on her ability to solve complex problems.
exercises.exp: Pride oneself on: tự hào về

exercises.q: The company ___ (emphatic) admitted that the product had serious flaws.
exercises.exp: Emphatic: chính công ty thừa nhận

exercises.q: We need to talk to ___ (reciprocal) more openly about our feelings.
exercises.exp: Reciprocal: nói chuyện với nhau

exercises.q: He applied ___ (reflexive) to the task with great determination.
exercises.exp: Applied himself: cống hiến, nỗ lực

exercises.q: The participants shared their experiences with ___ (reciprocal) during the workshop.
exercises.exp: One another: chia sẻ với nhau (nhiều người)

reorder.words: she taught herself to play the piano
they looked at one another and smiled
the president himself attended the ceremony
be careful or you will cut yourself
the students helped one another with the project
the door opened by itself
we enjoyed ourselves at the party
my grandmother lives by herself
they have not spoken to each other for years
please help yourself to some cake
the cat cleaned itself after eating
they blamed themselves for the accident
you need to believe in yourself
the members encouraged one another
she found herself in a difficult situation
the children behaved themselves very well
the ceo himself interviewed the candidates
we should introduce ourselves properly
the neighbours helped each other after the storm
i had to remind myself to stay calm
the company itself admitted the mistake
the twins confuse themselves with each other

passage.text: After moving to a new city for work, Sarah found {{1}} completely alone for the first time in her life. She told {{2}} that this was an opportunity to grow and learn. At the office, her colleagues introduced {{3}} warmly and helped {{4}} with the paperwork. Sarah and her new teammate quickly got to know {{5}} over coffee breaks. She reminded {{6}} to be patient and give the new situation time. The apartment she rented was small, but she decorated it {{7}} with things she loved. Her neighbours, an elderly couple, looked after {{8}} when one of them was ill. Sarah decided to push {{9}} to join a local book club, where members shared their thoughts with {{10}} enthusiastically.

The management team gathered to discuss the quarterly results. The CEO {{1}} presented the figures, which surprised everyone. The department heads congratulated {{2}} on the improved performance. However, when a problem arose in production, they started blaming {{3}} instead of finding a solution together. The employees had worked {{4}} to exhaustion trying to meet the deadline. The new manager found {{5}} caught between conflicting priorities. He told {{6}} that he needed to communicate more clearly with his team. The colleagues who respected {{7}} greatly had been working there for years. The two assistants, who were always competing with {{8}}, finally decided to support {{9}} instead. The company {{10}} needed to rethink its strategy.

The group of students had promised {{1}} they would study harder this semester. They formed study groups and helped {{2}} with difficult subjects. Maria, who had always been shy, pushed {{3}} to participate in class discussions. She was proud of {{4}} when she gave her first presentation. The professor {{5}} was impressed by the progress everyone had made. During exam week, the students encouraged {{6}} to keep going. They reminded {{7}} that hard work would pay off. After the results were announced, they congratulated {{8}} warmly. Each student told {{9}} that the effort had been worthwhile. The university {{10}} recognised their achievement with a special award ceremony.

Tom and his best friend Jake had known {{1}} since childhood. They considered {{2}} lucky to have such a strong friendship. When Jake lost his job, he blamed {{3}} and felt like a failure. Tom told him not to be so hard on {{4}}. The two friends supported {{5}} through the difficult months. Tom's wife, Sarah, also helped and found {{6}} worrying about both of them. She reminded {{7}} that everything would work out eventually. Jake eventually found a new position and the company's director {{8}} called to welcome him. The three of them celebrated together and toasted {{9}} with champagne. They promised {{10}} to always stay close, no matter what life brought.

The theatre group prepared {{1}} for the biggest performance of the year. The director {{2}} worked day and night to perfect every scene. The actors motivated {{3}} before going on stage. They had taught {{4}} to control their nerves through breathing exercises. During rehearsals, they gave feedback to {{5}} constructively. The lead actress found {{6}} struggling with a particularly difficult monologue. She told {{7}} to trust her training and instincts. Backstage, the crew helped {{8}} set up the complex lighting system. The two main characters had to convince {{9}} that they were truly in love. The audience {{10}} was moved to tears by the emotional finale.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về lần đầu tiên bạn làm một việc gì đó một mình (đi du lịch, chuyển nhà, học kỹ năng mới...), sử dụng ít nhất 4 đại từ phản thân (reflexive pronouns).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reflexive pronouns for solo experiences
writing_prompts.example: When I moved abroad for the first time, I found myself completely alone in a country where I didn't speak the language. I told myself that this was a chance to grow and become more independent. I taught myself how to cook local dishes and how to navigate the public transport system. By the end of the first month, I was proud of myself for adapting so quickly to the new environment and culture.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả một tình huống mà bạn và đồng nghiệp/bạn bè đã giúp đỡ lẫn nhau, sử dụng 'each other' và 'one another' ít nhất 3 lần.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reciprocal pronouns for mutual support
writing_prompts.example: During the final project at university, my classmates and I helped each other with research and editing. We supported one another when deadlines were tight and stress levels were high. Our group of four shared resources with one another and provided constructive feedback. We learned from each other's strengths and weaknesses, and in the end, we all received excellent grades for our collaborative work.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một dịp đặc biệt (lễ kỷ niệm, đám cưới, lễ tốt nghiệp) sử dụng đại từ phản thân nhấn mạnh (emphatic) và tương hỗ.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Emphatic reflexive and reciprocal pronouns
writing_prompts.example: At my sister's wedding, the bride herself had arranged all the beautiful decorations. My parents themselves prepared the traditional dishes for the reception. The couple looked at each other with such love and happiness that everyone was moved. The groom told everyone that he had to remind himself not to cry during the vows. All the guests congratulated one another and danced together until late in the evening. The entire event itself was a perfect celebration of love and family.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một thử thách bạn đã vượt qua, sử dụng đại từ phản thân để diễn tả sự tự động viên và nỗ lực của bản thân.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reflexive pronouns for self-motivation
writing_prompts.example: Training for the marathon was one of the hardest things I have ever done. I pushed myself to run every morning even when it was raining and cold outside. I reminded myself constantly that the pain was temporary but the achievement would last forever. There were days when I found myself exhausted and wanting to give up completely, but I believed in myself and kept going. Crossing the finish line, I felt incredibly proud of myself for not quitting when the journey became difficult and demanding.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả mối quan hệ giữa các thành viên trong gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn thân, sử dụng cả reflexive và reciprocal pronouns.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Both reflexive and reciprocal pronouns in relationships
writing_prompts.example: My family has always been very close. My grandparents themselves built the house where we all gather every summer. My brother and I have known each other our entire lives, and we still support each other through everything. During holidays, we all enjoy ourselves cooking together and sharing stories late into the night. My parents taught themselves how to use modern technology just to stay connected with us. Even my little cousin, who is usually shy, pushed herself to perform a song at our family gathering last Christmas.

upper.title: Generic or common-gender pronouns
upper.content:
📌 Generic Pronouns (Đại từ chung chung)
Dùng để nói về người nói chung, không chỉ một người cụ thể.

1. 'One' (trang trọng)
One should always be polite to others.
One never knows what might happen.

2. 'You' (thân mật, phổ biến)
You never know what life has in store.
You can't buy happiness with money.

3. 'We' (bao gồm cả người nói)
We all need to take care of our mental health.
In this country, we drive on the left.

4. 'They' (không xác định giới tính)
They say it's going to rain this weekend.
They have built a new shopping centre near the highway.
📌 Common-Gender Pronouns
Khi không biết hoặc không muốn xác định giới tính của người được đề cập.

1. 'They' / 'Them' / 'Their' (số ít)
Someone left their phone on the table.
Every student must bring their own laptop.
The manager said they would call us back.

2. 'He or she' (trang trọng)
Each participant should bring his or her identification.

3. 'They' cho người không xác định
Whoever is responsible, they should come forward.
The person who did this is clever, but they made a mistake.
📌 Phân biệt cách dùng
• Trang trọng nhất: one → One must do one's duty.
• Chung chung, bao quát: we → We live in a society.
• Thân mật, gần gũi: you → You can't judge a book by its cover.
• Không xác định: they → They're building a new bridge.
• Số ít, không rõ giới tính: they/them/their → Ask the doctor; they will know.
⚠️ Lưu ý về 'Singular They'
Singular they đã được công nhận trong tiếng Anh hiện đại và các hướng dẫn văn phong lớn (APA, MLA, Oxford).

When a student is stressed, they should seek help.
Each employee must submit their report by Friday.

Dùng để:
1. Không rõ danh tính/giới tính
2. Người không muốn xác định giới tính (non-binary)
3. Tránh lặp 'he or she' nặng nề
One should always treat others with respect.One: trang trọng, chung chung
You can never have too much patience in life.You: thân mật, chung chung

exercises.q: ___ should always try to be kind to strangers, regardless of the situation.
exercises.exp: One: generic pronoun, trang trọng

exercises.q: If a customer has a complaint, ___ can speak to the manager directly.
exercises.exp: They: singular they cho người không xác định giới tính

exercises.q: In this country, ___ drive on the right side of the road.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm cả người nói, diễn tả thói quen chung

exercises.q: ___ never know what tomorrow might bring, so live every day to the fullest.
exercises.exp: You: generic, thân mật, phổ biến

exercises.q: ___ say that breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
exercises.exp: They: người ta nói (general opinion)

exercises.q: Every participant must submit ___ application before the deadline.
exercises.exp: Their: possessive pronoun cho số ít không xác định

exercises.q: ___ can't judge a person's character just by looking at them.
exercises.exp: You: generic, thân mật

exercises.q: Someone has left ___ bag on the train seat.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu cho 'someone' (số ít, không rõ giới tính)

exercises.q: When a person is under a lot of stress, ___ should take time to relax.
exercises.exp: They: singular they cho 'a person'

exercises.q: In many cultures, ___ greet each other by bowing rather than shaking hands.
exercises.exp: They: người ta (in many cultures)

exercises.q: ___ must do one's best in every situation, no matter how difficult.
exercises.exp: One: trang trọng, kết hợp với 'one's'

exercises.q: A doctor should always listen carefully to ___ patients.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu cho 'a doctor' (số ít)

exercises.q: ___ have built a new hospital in the north of the city.
exercises.exp: They: người ta (không xác định ai)

exercises.q: Each student is responsible for ___ own learning and progress.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu số ít cho 'each student'

exercises.q: ___ can't have too many friends in this world.
exercises.exp: You: generic, thân mật

exercises.q: If an employee needs time off, ___ should request it in writing.
exercises.exp: They: singular they cho 'an employee'

exercises.q: As a society, ___ must do more to protect the environment for future generations.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm toàn xã hội, người nói + người nghe

exercises.q: Whoever left this mess, ___ should clean it up immediately.
exercises.exp: They: cho 'whoever' không xác định

exercises.q: In this company, ___ believe in transparency and open communication.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm người nói trong công ty

exercises.q: ___ never knows what challenges lie ahead in life.
exercises.exp: One: trang trọng, ý nói chung chung

exercises.q: The manager said ___ would review my application personally.
exercises.exp: They: không rõ giới tính của manager

exercises.q: ___ (One/You/They) should always be honest with oneself.
exercises.exp: One: trang trọng, phù hợp với 'oneself'

exercises.q: If a tourist is lost, ___ (they/he/she) can ask a police officer for directions.
exercises.exp: They: singular they cho 'a tourist'

exercises.q: In our office, ___ (we/they/one) always have a team meeting on Monday mornings.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm người nói trong văn phòng

exercises.q: ___ (You/One/They) can find almost anything on the internet these days.
exercises.exp: You: generic, thân mật

exercises.q: ___ (They/One/We) say that laughter is the best medicine for the soul.
exercises.exp: They: người ta nói

exercises.q: Every artist should follow ___ (their/his/her/one's) own creative vision.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu số ít cho 'every artist'

exercises.q: ___ (We/One/You) can't succeed at everything without making mistakes first.
exercises.exp: You: generic, thân mật

exercises.q: Has anyone lost ___ (their/his/her/one's) keys on the bus?
exercises.exp: Their: cho 'anyone' không xác định

exercises.q: When a child feels scared, ___ (they/he/she) needs comfort and reassurance.
exercises.exp: They: singular they cho 'a child'

exercises.q: In many countries, ___ (they/we/you) celebrate New Year with fireworks.
exercises.exp: They: người ta (in many countries)

exercises.q: ___ (One/You/We) must take responsibility for one's own actions.
exercises.exp: One: trang trọng, phù hợp 'one's'

exercises.q: A nurse should always be compassionate toward ___ (their/his/her/one's) patients.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu số ít cho 'a nurse'

exercises.q: ___ (They/You/We) have opened a new supermarket at the end of the street.
exercises.exp: They: người ta, không xác định

exercises.q: Each person must make up ___ (their/his/her/one's) own mind about the issue.
exercises.exp: Their: sở hữu cho 'each person'

exercises.q: ___ (We/They/One) as a community need to support our local businesses.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm cộng đồng

exercises.q: If a client is unsatisfied, ___ (they/he/she) can request a full refund.
exercises.exp: They: singular they

exercises.q: ___ (We/You/One) live in a world that is constantly changing and evolving.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm tất cả mọi người

exercises.q: Whoever made this beautiful cake, ___ (they/he/she) did a fantastic job.
exercises.exp: They: cho 'whoever' không xác định

exercises.q: In this school, ___ (we/they/you) encourage creativity and critical thinking.
exercises.exp: We: bao gồm người nói trong trường

exercises.q: ___ (One/You/They) must never forget one's roots and where one came from.
exercises.exp: One: trang trọng

exercises.q: The teacher said ___ (they/he/she) would grade the papers over the weekend.
exercises.exp: They: không rõ giới tính of teacher

exercises.q: If anyone calls, tell ___ (them/him/her/one) I'll be back in an hour.
exercises.exp: Them: tân ngữ cho 'anyone'

reorder.words: one should always be kind to strangers
if a customer complains they can speak to the manager
in this country we drive on the right
you never know what tomorrow might bring
they say breakfast is the most important meal
every participant must submit their application
you cannot judge a book by its cover
someone has left their bag on the train
when a person is stressed they should relax
they have built a new hospital in the city
each student is responsible for their own learning
you cannot have too many friends in life
we as a society must protect the environment
whoever left this mess they should clean it up
in this company we believe in transparency
one never knows what challenges lie ahead
every artist should follow their own vision
in many countries they celebrate with fireworks
we live in a world that is constantly changing
if a nurse is tired they should take a break
has anyone lost their keys on the bus
the manager said they would review my application

passage.text: In the modern workplace, {{1}} must be adaptable and open to change. When a new employee joins the team, {{2}} should receive proper training and support. {{3}} can expect to face challenges, but {{4}} should also find opportunities for growth. In many companies, {{5}} have implemented flexible working hours. Every manager is responsible for {{6}} team's wellbeing and productivity. {{7}} say that a positive work environment leads to better results. As colleagues, {{8}} should help each other and share knowledge freely. If a team member is struggling, {{9}} should feel comfortable asking for assistance. {{10}} must never forget that collaboration is key to success.

{{1}} say that learning a new language opens many doors in life. When {{2}} decides to learn English, {{3}} must be patient and consistent. {{4}} can improve faster if {{5}} practise every day, even for just fifteen minutes. In many schools, {{6}} now offer online resources for students. Every learner should find {{7}} own motivation to study. {{8}} as language learners should celebrate small achievements. If a student feels discouraged, {{9}} should remember why {{10}} started learning in the first place.

As parents, {{1}} all want what is best for our children. {{2}} say that the early years are the most important for development. When a child is upset, {{3}} needs comfort and understanding. {{4}} should never dismiss a child's feelings as unimportant. In many families, {{5}} have established daily routines that provide structure. Every parent must find {{6}} own approach to discipline and education. {{7}} can be challenging to balance work and family life. As a society, {{8}} should support parents with better policies and resources. If a parent is overwhelmed, {{9}} should not hesitate to ask for help. {{10}} must remember that no one is perfect at parenting.

{{1}} should never underestimate the power of a simple act of kindness. When {{2}} helps someone in need, {{3}} not only improves that person's day but also enriches their own life. In many communities, {{4}} have started volunteer groups to support elderly neighbours. Every person can make a difference in {{5}} own unique way. {{6}} say that kindness is contagious and spreads easily. As human beings, {{7}} all have the capacity to be compassionate. If someone is going through a difficult time, {{8}} may just need a listening ear. {{9}} could be the reason someone smiles today. {{10}} must never forget that even small gestures matter.

In modern education, {{1}} have completely transformed how students learn. When a teacher uses technology in the classroom, {{2}} can engage students more effectively. {{3}} say that interactive learning produces better outcomes. Every student should have access to {{4}} own digital devices for studying. {{5}} as educators need to adapt to these changes constantly. If a school cannot afford modern equipment, {{6}} must find creative alternatives. {{7}} can never go wrong with investing in quality education. In many countries, {{8}} are revising their curriculum to include digital skills. The principal said {{9}} would allocate more budget for technology. {{10}} should always prioritise children's education above all else.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn về tầm quan trọng của việc học tập suốt đời, sử dụng 'one', 'you', 'we' và 'they' làm generic pronouns.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Generic pronouns in lifelong learning
writing_prompts.example: One should never stop learning because knowledge has no limits. You can always discover something new, whether through books, courses, or life experiences. They say that the most successful people are those who remain curious throughout their lives. We as a society benefit when everyone has access to education and opportunities for personal growth. We all need to embrace the idea that learning is a journey, not a destination, and one must stay open-minded to truly grow.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả môi trường làm việc lý tưởng, sử dụng singular they và các generic pronouns phù hợp.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Singular they in workplace descriptions
writing_prompts.example: In an ideal workplace, every employee should feel valued and respected for their contributions. When a person joins the team, they should receive proper onboarding and mentorship. One must have opportunities to grow and develop new skills throughout their career. We believe that open communication and transparency are essential for a healthy work environment. They say that happy employees are more productive, and I completely agree with that statement based on my own professional experience.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về cách chăm sóc sức khỏe tinh thần, sử dụng các đại từ generic như 'you', 'one', 'we' và sở hữu 'their'.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Generic pronouns for mental health advice
writing_prompts.example: You should always make time for your mental health, even when life gets busy and overwhelming. One must learn to recognise the signs of stress and burnout before they become too serious. We all need moments of rest and reflection to recharge our energy and maintain balance. They recommend practising mindfulness or meditation as effective ways to reduce anxiety. Every person should find their own strategies for staying mentally healthy, because what works for one person may not work for another.

writing_prompts.vi: Chia sẻ quan điểm về việc bảo vệ môi trường, sử dụng ít nhất 4 đại từ generic khác nhau.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Generic pronouns for environmental topics
writing_prompts.example: We must take immediate action to protect our planet before it is too late. One should reduce their carbon footprint by using public transportation or recycling more effectively. You can make a difference by choosing sustainable products and supporting eco-friendly companies. They say that small changes in our daily habits can have a significant collective impact on the environment. Every person can make their contribution, no matter how small, and we as a global community must work together to create a more sustainable future for generations to come.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về tầm quan trọng của sự đồng cảm trong xã hội, sử dụng 'they' (số ít), 'we', 'one', và 'you'.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed generic pronouns for empathy topic
writing_prompts.example: When someone is going through a difficult time, they need understanding and support from those around them. We should always try to put ourselves in other people's shoes before passing judgment or making assumptions. One must remember that everyone is fighting their own battles, often invisible to the outside world. You never know what someone might be dealing with behind their smile, so a little kindness can go a very long way.

upper.title: Compound nouns and possessive forms
upper.content:
📌 Compound Nouns (Danh từ ghép)
Danh từ ghép được tạo thành từ hai hay nhiều từ kết hợp với nhau.

1. noun + noun
toothbrush, bookshelf, bedroom, football

2. adjective + noun
full moon, greenhouse, blackboard, software

3. noun + verb / verb + noun
washing machine, swimming pool, sunrise, rainfall

4. noun + preposition / preposition + noun
passer-by, mother-in-law, underground, afternoon

5. verb + preposition (phrasal nouns)
breakdown, checkout, takeaway, makeup
📌 Cách viết Compound Nouns
• Closed (viết liền): toothpaste, haircut, airport
• Hyphenated (có gạch nối): mother-in-law, well-being, six-pack
• Open (cách rời): police station, bus stop, high school

⚠️ Không có quy tắc cố định – cần tra từ điển.
📌 Possessive Forms (Sở hữu cách)
's (Apostrophe s)
• Người/vật số ít: John's car, the cat's tail
• Danh từ số nhiều không kết thúc bằng s: children's toys, men's room
• Danh từ số nhiều kết thúc bằng s: the students' books, the girls' room
• Danh từ riêng kết thúc bằng s: James's car / James' car

Sở hữu kép (Double possessive)
He is a friend of my father's.
That painting is a work of Picasso's.
📌 Sở hữu cho vật và ý tưởng
• Vật vô tri thường dùng of: the cover of the book, the end of the story
• Nhưng cũng có thể dùng 's cho: thời gian, khoảng cách, tiền tệ
today's news, a week's holiday, two miles' walk, ten dollars' worth
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ My mother's-in-law house → ✅ My mother-in-law's house (sở hữu thêm vào cuối danh từ ghép)
❌ The student's books are on the table. (nếu nhiều student) → ✅ The students' books...
❌ I met a friend of my mother. → ✅ I met a friend of my mother's.
My mother-in-law's house is a beautiful old cottage.Sở hữu thêm vào cuối compound noun
I need a week's holiday after this stressful project.'s với thời gian

exercises.q: My ___ house is located in a quiet suburb of the city.
exercises.exp: Sở hữu thêm 's vào cuối compound noun

exercises.q: The ___ meeting will take place in the conference room on the second floor.
exercises.exp: Managers' (số nhiều kết thúc bằng s → chỉ thêm ')

exercises.q: She has a ___ that she reads every morning without fail.
exercises.exp: Newspaper: danh từ ghép (news + paper)

exercises.q: After a long day at work, I need at least ___ holiday to recover fully.
exercises.exp: A week's holiday: sở hữu với thời gian

exercises.q: He is a close friend of ___.
exercises.exp: Double possessive: a friend of + possessive

exercises.q: The ___ department has announced new regulations for imports.
exercises.exp: Women's: sở hữu, women là số nhiều bất quy tắc

exercises.q: The meeting is at the ___ office on Main Street.
exercises.exp: Doctor's: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: We walked for about two ___ from the station to the hotel.
exercises.exp: Miles': sở hữu với khoảng cách (số nhiều)

exercises.q: The ___ is filled with exciting stories about mythical creatures.
exercises.exp: Children's: sở hữu, children là số nhiều bất quy tắc

exercises.q: I need to stop at the ___ to pick up a package.
exercises.exp: Post office: open compound noun

exercises.q: That painting is a ___ that was created during his early period.
exercises.exp: Work of art: compound noun với giới từ

exercises.q: The ___ should be installed before winter arrives.
exercises.exp: Heating system: noun + noun compound

exercises.q: I read about the accident in ___ newspaper.
exercises.exp: Yesterday's: sở hữu với thời gian

exercises.q: The ___ toys were scattered all over the living room floor.
exercises.exp: Children's: sở hữu (children bất quy tắc)

exercises.q: She bought a new ___ for her kitchen and it works perfectly.
exercises.exp: Washing machine: compound noun (verb + noun)

exercises.q: The ___ decision affected everyone in the organisation negatively.
exercises.exp: CEO's: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: We need to respect the ___ boundaries and privacy.
exercises.exp: Others': sở hữu số nhiều của 'others'

exercises.q: The ___ are so beautiful in autumn with all the colours.
exercises.exp: Leaves: plural of leaf (irregular)

exercises.q: I need to buy a ___ for my little niece's birthday.
exercises.exp: Girl's bike: sở hữu số ít (một cô bé)

exercises.q: There is a ___ at the end of the road that serves amazing food.
exercises.exp: Takeaway: compound noun từ phrasal verb

exercises.q: The ___ were playing happily in the garden all afternoon.
exercises.exp: Children: plural irregular

exercises.q: My ___ (mother-in-law) house is decorated beautifully for Christmas.
exercises.exp: 's thêm vào cuối compound noun

exercises.q: The ___ (manager) meeting has been rescheduled for next Tuesday.
exercises.exp: Managers' (số nhiều kết thúc bằng s)

exercises.q: He is an old friend of ___ (my father).
exercises.exp: Double possessive: friend of + father's

exercises.q: The store is just a five ___ (minute) walk from the station.
exercises.exp: Minutes': sở hữu với khoảng cách thời gian số nhiều

exercises.q: I need to read ___ (today) newspaper for the latest updates.
exercises.exp: Today's: sở hữu với thời gian

exercises.q: The ___ (children) bedroom is on the second floor of the house.
exercises.exp: Children's: sở hữu bất quy tắc

exercises.q: She works at the local ___ (police station).
exercises.exp: Police station: open compound noun

exercises.q: The ___ (CEO) speech inspired everyone in the company.
exercises.exp: CEO's: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: We need a ___ (week) notice before you take annual leave.
exercises.exp: Week's: sở hữu với thời gian số ít

exercises.q: The ___ (employee) feedback was collected through an anonymous survey.
exercises.exp: Employees' (số nhiều)

exercises.q: I bought a new ___ (tooth) brush from the pharmacy.
exercises.exp: Toothbrush: closed compound noun

exercises.q: That is a beautiful painting of ___ (Picasso).
exercises.exp: Picasso's: sở hữu danh từ riêng

exercises.q: The ___ (fire) station is located just around the corner.
exercises.exp: Fire station: open compound noun

exercises.q: She received a ___ (month) salary bonus for her excellent performance.
exercises.exp: Month's: sở hữu với thời gian số ít

exercises.q: The ___ (student)考试成绩 were surprisingly good this semester.
exercises.exp: Students' (số nhiều kết thúc bằng s)

exercises.q: I need to buy a new ___ (hair) brush for my trip.
exercises.exp: Hairbrush: closed compound noun

exercises.q: The ___ (passer-by) attention was caught by the street performance.
exercises.exp: Passer-by's: sở hữu compound noun với gạch nối

exercises.q: We stayed at my ___ (sister-in-law) apartment during our visit.
exercises.exp: Sister-in-law's: sở hữu cuối compound noun

exercises.q: The ___ (team)共同努力 resulted in the project's success.
exercises.exp: Team's: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: It's about two ___ (hour) drive from here to the mountains.
exercises.exp: Hours': sở hữu khoảng cách thời gian số nhiều

exercises.q: The ___ (women) restroom is located next to the elevator.
exercises.exp: Women's: sở hữu bất quy tắc

exercises.q: She bought ten ___ (dollar) worth of lottery tickets.
exercises.exp: Dollars': sở hữu với tiền tệ số nhiều

reorder.words: my mother in law's house is in the suburbs
the managers meeting has been rescheduled
he is a close friend of my brother's
we walked for two miles from the station
the children's books are on the bottom shelf
i need to stop at the post office
i read about it in yesterday's newspaper
the ceo's speech inspired everyone in the company
she bought a new washing machine for her kitchen
that painting is a work of picasso's
i need a week's holiday to recover
the women's department is on the third floor
the students feedback was collected anonymously
she received a month's salary bonus
there is a takeaway at the end of the road
the fire station is just around the corner
it is about two hours' drive to the mountains
my sister in law's apartment is very cosy
the team's effort resulted in the project success
we stayed at my grandmother's house for the weekend
the children's toys were scattered everywhere
she bought ten dollars' worth of lottery tickets

passage.text: My {{1}} house has been in the family for over sixty years. The {{2}} garden is full of beautiful roses that my grandmother planted. I remember spending many {{3}} holidays there as a child. The {{4}} room upstairs was my favourite place to read. My {{5}} cooking was always the highlight of our visits. The {{6}} story about how they met still makes me smile. After a few {{7}} walk through the old neighbourhood, we would return for dinner. My {{8}} recommendations for books and films were always excellent. The {{9}} old furniture in the living room has so much character. I hope to inherit some of the {{10}} possessions one day.

The {{1}} decision to expand the business was announced at the annual meeting. The {{2}} concerns about job security were addressed by the HR director. After two {{3}} negotiations, both parties finally reached an agreement. The {{4}} new offices are located in the city centre. The {{5}} bonuses will be paid at the end of the year. A {{6}} notice is required before any major changes are implemented. The {{7}} opinions were collected through an anonymous online survey. The {{8}} approach to management has been very successful. We need to consider the {{9}} interests before making final decisions. The {{10}} investment in new technology has already paid off.

My {{1}} wedding was the most beautiful ceremony I have ever attended. The {{2}} dress was absolutely stunning and elegant. The {{3}} suits were perfectly tailored for the occasion. The {{4}} reception hall was decorated with thousands of flowers. After a {{5}} honeymoon in the Maldives, the couple returned to their new apartment. The {{6}} parents were both incredibly happy and emotional during the speeches. The {{7}} cake was a magnificent three-tiered creation. The {{8}} party continued late into the night with music and dancing. The {{9}} gifts were displayed on a large table near the entrance. The {{10}} organisation of the entire event was flawless from start to finish.

Our {{1}} graduation was a milestone we had worked towards for years. The {{2}} speeches were inspiring and moving. The {{3}} hard work finally paid off with excellent results. The {{4}} joy was evident on everyone's faces during the ceremony. After a {{5}} celebration trip, we all started applying for jobs. The {{6}} careers have taken different paths since we left university. The {{7}} alumni association organises reunions every five years. My {{8}} support throughout my studies was invaluable. The {{9}} campus looked beautiful in the summer sunshine during our last day. The {{10}} memories of those years will stay with us forever.

The {{1}} first day at the new school was both exciting and nerve-wracking. The {{2}} classrooms were modern and well-equipped. The {{3}} playground was huge with lots of equipment for different ages. The {{4}} canteen serves healthy and delicious meals every day. After only a {{5}} adjustment period, the children settled in perfectly. The {{6}} teaching methods are innovative and engaging for the students. The {{7}} results have improved significantly this academic year. The {{8}} policies encourage creativity and critical thinking. The {{9}} library has an extensive collection of books and digital resources. The {{10}} overall atmosphere is warm and welcoming for everyone.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả ngôi nhà mơ ước của bạn và các phòng trong đó, sử dụng compound nouns (như living room, bedroom, washing machine) và sở hữu cách.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Compound nouns and possessive forms in home description
writing_prompts.example: My dream house's location would be near the coast with a beautiful sea view. The living room would have large windows that let in plenty of natural sunlight throughout the day. My bedroom's balcony would be the perfect spot for morning coffee and reading. The kitchen's centrepiece would be a large island where family and friends can gather. The garden would have a swimming pool and a children's play area. The house's overall design would be modern but cosy, with a home office where I could work comfortably from home.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một người thân trong gia đình và đồ vật của họ, sử dụng sở hữu cách và double possessive (friend of my mother's).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive forms for family descriptions
writing_prompts.example: My grandmother's house is where our whole family gathers every Sunday for lunch. My mother's cooking is always the highlight of these gatherings, especially her famous apple pie. My father's workshop in the garage is filled with tools and interesting projects. My sister-in-law's garden is full of colourful flowers that she takes care of with great love and dedication. A close friend of my brother's once told me that our family's warmth and hospitality are truly special and rare.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một chuyến đi, sử dụng sở hữu cách với thời gian và khoảng cách (a week's holiday, two hours' drive, yesterday's adventure).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with time and distance expressions
writing_prompts.example: Last summer, we took a week's holiday in the countryside to escape the busy city life. After a two hours' drive through beautiful mountain roads, we finally arrived at our destination. Yesterday's adventure included hiking to a hidden waterfall and discovering a secret cave behind it. Today's plan is to visit a local farmer's market and try some regional specialties. We are planning a three days' stay in a traditional cottage that has been in our family for generations and holds so many precious memories.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả nơi làm việc của bạn, sử dụng compound nouns và sở hữu cách để chỉ các phòng ban và đồ vật.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Compound nouns and possessives in workplace
writing_prompts.example: The company's headquarters is a modern building with an open-plan office design on every floor. The meeting room on the fifth floor has state-of-the-art video conferencing equipment. My office's window overlooks the city skyline, which is especially beautiful at sunset. The CEO's assistant is incredibly organised and helpful with scheduling appointments. The employees' lounge is a comfortable space where colleagues can relax and socialise during their breaks. The company's success is the result of everyone's hard work and dedication.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một bữa tiệc hoặc lễ kỷ niệm, sử dụng compound nouns và các hình thức sở hữu ('s, s', of).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Compound nouns and possessives in celebration context
writing_prompts.example: My best friend's birthday party was held at a beautiful beach house last weekend. The birthday cake's design was inspired by her favourite novel and looked absolutely stunning. The party's decorations included fairy lights and tropical flowers that created a magical atmosphere. My cousin sister's graduation celebration followed the next day, with a more formal gathering at a restaurant. A close friend of the family's prepared a heartfelt speech that moved everyone to tears. The evening's entertainment included live music and dancing that continued until the early hours of the morning.

upper.title: Possessive 's with time expressions: Two hours' walk
upper.content:
📌 Sở hữu cách với thời gian (Time expressions)
Trong tiếng Anh, chúng ta dùng 's / s' với các danh từ chỉ thời gian, khoảng cách, tiền tệ để diễn tả số đo.

Cấu trúc: Số + danh từ (thời gian/khoảng cách/tiền tệ) + 's/s' + danh từ

1. Thời gian:
• a minute's silence (một phút mặc niệm)
• a day's work (một ngày làm việc)
• today's news (tin tức hôm nay)
• yesterday's meeting (cuộc họp hôm qua)
• a week's holiday (một tuần nghỉ)
• a month's salary (lương một tháng)
• two months' rent (tiền thuê hai tháng)
• a year's experience (kinh nghiệm một năm)
• three years' study (ba năm học)
• ten years' time (thời gian mười năm)
📌 Khoảng cách
• a mile's walk (đi bộ một dặm)
• two miles' walk (đi bộ hai dặm)
• a kilometre's distance (khoảng cách một km)
• ten kilometres' drive (lái xe 10 km)

Tiền tệ:
• a dollar's worth (trị giá một đô la)
• ten dollars' worth (trị giá mười đô la)
• a pound's worth (trị giá một bảng)
• fifty pounds' worth (trị giá 50 bảng)
📌 Quy tắc thêm 's / s'
Số ít → thêm 's
• a day → a day's work
• a week → a week's holiday

Số nhiều kết thúc bằng s → thêm '
• two days → two days' work
• five weeks → five weeks' holiday

Số nhiều bất quy tắc → thêm 's
• children → children's hour (giờ dành cho trẻ em)
📌 So sánh với cấu trúc không sở hữu
Có sở hữu: a week's holiday (nhấn mạnh thời gian kéo dài)
Không sở hữu: a one-week holiday (dùng tính từ ghép, không có 's)

• two hours' delay (chậm hai tiếng)
• a two-hour delay (chậm hai tiếng - dùng gạch nối)
The beach is only a ten minutes' walk from our hotel.Sở hữu với khoảng cách thời gian
We need at least a week's notice to process your request.Sở hữu với thời gian số ít

exercises.q: The hotel is only a ___ walk from the beach.
exercises.exp: Ten minutes' walk: sở hữu với khoảng cách

exercises.q: She needs at least a ___ holiday to fully recover from her illness.
exercises.exp: A week's holiday: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: I read about the event in ___ newspaper.
exercises.exp: Today's newspaper: sở hữu với thời gian

exercises.q: We observed a ___ silence to honour the victims of the tragedy.
exercises.exp: A minute's silence: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: After three ___ training, she felt confident enough to take the exam.
exercises.exp: Months': sở hữu số nhiều (three months)

exercises.q: The supermarket is a five ___ drive from my house.
exercises.exp: Five minutes' drive: sở hữu số nhiều

exercises.q: He has over ten ___ experience in the software industry.
exercises.exp: Years' experience: sở hữu số nhiều (ten years)

exercises.q: I spent a ___ salary on buying new furniture for my apartment.
exercises.exp: A month's salary: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: The library is a short ___ walk from the campus.
exercises.exp: Ten minutes' walk: sở hữu số nhiều với khoảng cách

exercises.q: She bought twenty ___ worth of petrol for her car.
exercises.exp: Twenty dollars' worth: sở hữu số nhiều với tiền

exercises.q: The project requires at least six ___ planning before implementation.
exercises.exp: Months' planning: sở hữu số nhiều (six months)

exercises.q: I need a ___ rest after working non-stop for the entire week.
exercises.exp: A day's rest: sở hữu số ít

exercises.q: We are just a ___ journey away from the capital city by train.
exercises.exp: Two hours' journey: sở hữu số nhiều

passage.text: After a {{1}} absence from work, Sarah returned feeling refreshed and energised. The office was just a {{2}} walk from her new apartment, which was very convenient. {{3}} meeting was the first item on her schedule. She had been given a {{4}} notice about the new project her team was starting. The project required at least three {{5}} planning before the launch date. Her colleague mentioned that he had twenty {{6}} experience in this type of work. The training programme was a {{7}} intensive course that covered all essential skills. {{8}} deadline seemed impossible to meet at first. After a {{9}} delay due to technical issues, the team finally presented their work. {{10}} presentation was well received by the management team.

The mountain cabin was a {{1}} drive from the nearest town. We had prepared a {{2}} supply of food for our trip. {{3}} adventure began early in the morning when the weather was still cool. After a {{4}} hike through the forest, we reached a beautiful waterfall. The view from the summit was worth every {{5}} effort. We returned after a {{6}} absence feeling completely rejuvenated. {{7}} weather was perfect for outdoor activities. We had a {{8}} rest before starting the journey back home. The entire trip required two {{9}} planning and preparation. {{10}} memories of this experience will stay with us forever.

The construction of the new library required a {{1}} worth of materials. It was a {{2}} walk from the main road to the building site. {{3}} progress report showed that the project was ahead of schedule. The architect had thirty {{4}} experience in designing public buildings. After a {{5}} delay caused by the weather, work resumed quickly. The workers had a {{6}} break every afternoon to rest. {{7}} completion date was set for early next year. We need to give a {{8}} notice before the official opening ceremony. The library will be a {{9}} drive for most residents. {{10}} grand opening will be a significant event for the community.

The university requires a {{1}} notice before students can withdraw from a course. {{2}} lecture on quantum physics was cancelled due to the professor's illness. After several {{3}} delay, the new science building was finally completed. The research team had spent five {{4}} working on this important project. {{5}} deadline for submitting the thesis is fast approaching. The library has a {{6}} extension for borrowing books during exam period. {{7}} graduation ceremony will be held in the main hall. It's only a {{8}} walk from the student accommodation to the campus. {{9}} exam results will be published online. A {{10}} silence was observed in memory of a beloved professor.

After a {{1}} flight delay, the passengers finally boarded the plane. {{2}} departure was scheduled for six in the evening. The airline offered a {{3}} hotel stay for those who missed their connections. The pilot had over twenty {{4}} flying experience with this airline. {{5}} in-flight meal was surprisingly good. The journey was a {{6}} flight across the Atlantic Ocean. {{7}} weather forecast predicted clear skies for the entire route. Passengers were given a {{8}} rest before landing. {{9}} arrival was met with applause from everyone on board. A {{10}} wait at baggage claim was the only downside of the otherwise smooth trip.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả hành trình đi làm hoặc đi học hàng ngày của bạn, sử dụng ít nhất 4 sở hữu cách với thời gian/khoảng cách (như ten minutes' walk, an hour's drive).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with time and distance in daily commute
writing_prompts.example: My daily commute involves a ten minutes' walk to the bus station and then a half hour's ride to the city centre. Yesterday's journey was particularly challenging because of the heavy rain and traffic congestion. The bus stop is only a five minutes' walk from my office building, which is very convenient. Today's commute was much smoother since I left home earlier than usual. After a full day's work, the journey back home feels longer, but it gives me time to read and relax before arriving.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một kỳ nghỉ bạn đã có, sử dụng sở hữu cách với thời gian (a week's holiday, two days' stay, a month's planning).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with time expressions for holidays
writing_prompts.example: Last summer, I took a week's holiday in the beautiful countryside of northern Italy. The trip required a month's planning to organise all the accommodations and activities we wanted to do. Yesterday's trip to the local vineyard was absolutely wonderful, with stunning views of the rolling hills. After a two days' stay in a charming traditional farmhouse, we moved to a coastal town for the remaining time. Today's adventure involved hiking through ancient forests and discovering hidden waterfalls along the scenic mountain trails.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về công việc hoặc dự án của bạn, sử dụng sở hữu cách với các biểu thức thời gian và khoảng cách (a year's experience, three months' training, etc.).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with time in work context
writing_prompts.example: I have over five years' experience in project management, which has taught me how to handle complex situations effectively. The company provided three months' training for new employees to ensure they are well prepared for their roles. Today's meeting with the client went very well, and they approved our proposed plan. Tomorrow's presentation will be crucial for securing the budget for next quarter's initiatives. We have a week's deadline to finalise the proposal, so the team is working hard to meet this target and deliver high quality results on time.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về việc mua sắm hoặc chi tiêu, sử dụng sở hữu cách với tiền tệ (dollars' worth, pounds' worth).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with currency expressions
writing_prompts.example: I bought fifty dollars' worth of groceries at the supermarket yesterday, which should last me for the whole week. My friend spent over a hundred pounds' worth on concert tickets for her favourite band. Yesterday's purchase of a new winter coat was a necessary investment since the cold weather is approaching quickly. Today's shopping trip was more modest, just twenty dollars' worth of fresh vegetables and fruits from the local market. I also bought ten dollars' worth of chocolate as a treat for myself after a long and tiring week at work.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả một sự kiện đặc biệt (đám cưới, lễ tốt nghiệp, sinh nhật), sử dụng sở hữu cách với thời gian.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Possessive with time for special events
writing_prompts.example: My sister's wedding was the result of a year's planning and preparation by the whole family. Yesterday's rehearsal went smoothly, with everyone knowing their roles and responsibilities perfectly. Today's ceremony was absolutely beautiful, with the bride looking stunning in her elegant white dress. The couple will have a week's honeymoon in Bali before returning to start their new life together. Next week's celebration for the extended family will be another wonderful gathering. After a full day's celebration, everyone was tired but incredibly happy and filled with beautiful memories.
